cvIntro: Software Engineer specializing in scalable backend systems and applied AI/ML solutions. I design and ship production APIs, distributed services, and reliable cloud infrastructure from architecture through deployment.
githubAbout:
I'm a **Software Engineer** focused on scalable backend systems and applied AI/ML solutions, bringing production APIs and intelligent workflows from prototype to stable production.

I bridge high-throughput backend architecture and applied ML orchestration: REST APIs, data pipelines, secure authentication, caching, and cloud infrastructure on AWS.

Currently at **Keyrium**, I lead development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Universal Loyalty Rewards and Kronix Stock Trading using **Node.js**, **TypeScript**, and **PostgreSQL**, including testing (85% code coverage) and end-to-end AWS architecture with security and monitoring.

**Focus areas:** Scalable distributed architectures · Backend systems · AI/ML pipelines · Cloud & API optimization

**Stack:** Node.js · TypeScript · Python · PostgreSQL · AWS · Docker · RAG · Agentic AI

**Let's connect:** [okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com](mailto:okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com) · [Portfolio](https://epicnode.hostless.site) · [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/okeowoemmanuelm/)
linkedinAbout:
Innovative engineer focused on performance and reliability. I build high-scale backend systems and applied AI/ML solutions for production environments.

My work spans RESTful API development, database optimization, secure authentication, caching, AWS infrastructure, and cross-functional collaboration with cybersecurity and product teams.

Currently at Keyrium, I lead development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Universal Loyalty Rewards and Kronix Stock Trading using Node.js, TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, including a testing framework with 85% code coverage and end-to-end AWS architecture design with IAM, encryption, Grafana monitoring, and audit controls.

I also engineer AI-powered applications and ML pipelines through Kings Technologies & Innovations, using Python, OpenAI APIs, Scikit-Learn, and MLflow.

Previously, I've improved API and database performance by 30–80% across fintech and platform backends, and built secure auth systems with JWT, OAuth 2.0, MFA, and RBAC.

Open to Software Engineer, Backend Engineer, and AI/ML system roles (remote/hybrid).

Portfolio: epicnode.hostless.site
Email: okeowoemmanuelm@gmail.com

highlights: Production-Grade Backends: scalable REST APIs, microservices, auth, caching, and PostgreSQL at scale
Applied AI/ML Systems: LLM integration, ML pipelines, semantic search, and intelligent automation
Core Tech Stack: Node.js, TypeScript, and Python with Docker, AWS, and CI/CD automation
Data & Infrastructure: relational databases, query optimization, AWS architecture, and secure authentication
Continuous Growth: open-source contributor exploring emerging backend and AI tooling

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Leading development of production-grade RESTful APIs for Universal Loyalty Rewards and Kronix Stock Trading platforms using Node.js and TypeScript. Architecting secure authentication systems and third-party integrations for multi-channel communication. Established a comprehensive testing framework with 85% code coverage. Leading cross-functional collaboration with cybersecurity to design end-to-end AWS infrastructure architecture, including network security, IAM, encryption, Grafana monitoring, and audit controls.

experience.title: Founder
experience.description: Engineering AI-powered applications and ML pipelines using Python, OpenAI APIs, Scikit-Learn, MLflow, and modern MLOps practices. Building scalable, high-availability systems that turn data into intelligent automation.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Refactored database queries with targeted indexes and leaner joins, cutting query times by 40–60%. Streamlined middleware to improve API throughput by 30–50%. Introduced Redis-backed caching and tuned cache headers for faster static asset loads. Improved memory efficiency through logging cleanup, yielding 20–30% better resource utilization. Added an admin performance endpoint with key metrics for tracking and debugging.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer

Built RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express, implemented JWT-based role authentication, integrated PayStack and PCI-DSS compliance, and optimized PostgreSQL schemas for secure, scalable performance under concurrent load.
